case_title: FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A. VS. LYNESTA Y HUNTER et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT LYNESTA HUNTER'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS. ALTHOUGH THE TENTATIVE STATED A HEARING WAS REQUIRED, THERE WERE NO OTHER APPEARANCES. MS. CHYLIK PROVIDED A COPY OF THE OPPOSITION FILED BY PLAINTIFFS. THE COURT REVIEWED THE MATTER AND GRANTED THE MOTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
Off Calendar Dec-13-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT LYNESTA HUNTER'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS. Appearances: Jessica L. Chylik (863.5718 x103) for defendant and moving party. Although the tentative stated a hearing was required, there were no other appearances. Ms. Chylik provided a copy of the opposition filed by plaintiffs. The court reviewed the matter and granted the motion. Order signed in open court. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
